result:
All tasks complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Notification Orchestration API Contract

### Files Created
- **`src/gateway/protocol/schema/notifications.ts`** — TypeBox schemas for all notification types, params, results, and event payloads
- **`src/gateway/server-methods/notifications.ts`** — Handler stubs with full validation (awaiting persistence layer)
- **`src/gateway/server-methods/notifications.test.ts`** — 38 tests covering schema validation + handler behavior

### Files Modified
- **`src/gateway/protocol/schema.ts`** — Re-exports notification schemas
- **`src/gateway/protocol/schema/types.ts`** — 18 TypeScript types derived from schemas
- **`src/gateway/protocol/index.ts`** — 8 AJV validators compiled + all exports
- **`src/gateway/server-methods-list.ts`** — 8 methods + 3 events registered
- **`src/gateway/method-scopes.ts`** — Scope assignments: read (list/get/status), write (send), admin (create/update/delete)
- **`src/gateway/server-broadcast.ts`** — Event scope guards for `notification.{sent,delivered,failed}`
- **`src/gateway/server-methods.ts`** — Notification handlers wired into core handlers

### API Surface
| Method | Scope | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `notifications.rules.list` | read | List notification rules |
| `notifications.rules.get` | read | Get a specific rule |
| `notifications.rules.create` | admin | Create a new rule |
| `notifications.rules.update` | admin | Update an existing rule |
| `notifications.rules.delete` | admin | Delete a rule |
| `notifications.send` | write | Send a notification |
| `notifications.list` | read | List notification history |
| `notifications.status` | read | Get delivery status |

### Events
- `notification.sent` — Broadcast when notification dispatched
- `notification.delivered` — Broadcast on delivery confirmation
- `notification.failed` — Broadcast on delivery failure

All 38 tests pass, typecheck is clean, and existing tests remain green.
